features.name: Video generation quality
features.description: Quality, realism, fidelity, or technical issues of generated videos (motion artifacts, blurriness, glitches, etc.)

features.name: Image generation quality
features.description: Quality of generated still images (sharpness, aesthetics, realism)

features.name: Prompt adherence
features.description: Whether the output matches the user's text prompt instructions

features.name: Character / input image consistency
features.description: Whether the generated output preserves the face, character, clothing, or scene from the uploaded reference image

features.name: Credits and pricing
features.description: Credit consumption, running out of credits, expensive subscription, no refunds when generation fails

features.name: Content moderation / safety filters
features.description: Safety filters or censorship being too restrictive, blocking legitimate prompts

features.name: App vs web feature parity
features.description: App is missing features the website has, or the website is better than the app overall

features.name: Extend video / what-happens-next
features.description: The removed Extend Video / 'What happens next' feature for making longer continuous videos

features.name: Frame-to-frame / start-end frames
features.description: Missing start-frame / end-frame / frame-to-frame transition feature

features.name: Ingredients / scene composition
features.description: Missing 'Ingredients' option (reference assets for image-to-video composition)

features.name: Download and export
features.description: Failures or problems downloading or exporting the generated media

features.name: Download resolution / upscaling
features.description: Missing 2K / 4K / upscale options on download, low export resolution

features.name: Performance and speed
features.description: Slow loading, lag, long render times, general performance issues

features.name: Crashes and errors
features.description: App crashing, generic errors, 'doesn't work', failed generations

features.name: Login / authentication
features.description: Sign-in failures, getting logged out, age verification, account issues

features.name: Regional availability
features.description: App or features not available in the user's country / region

features.name: UI / UX design
features.description: Interface design, ease of use, navigation, confusing or clean layout

features.name: Model selection
features.description: Availability or choice of underlying models (Veo 3 Lite/Fast/Quality, Nano Banana, Omni Flash)

features.name: Watermark on output
features.description: Watermark or logo appearing on generated content

features.name: Video duration / length
features.description: Length of generated videos, ability to make longer videos

features.name: Voice / audio quality
features.description: Quality of generated voiceovers, dialog, audio, sound effects

features.name: Language support / localization
features.description: Output language issues (generating in wrong language) or UI not localized

features.name: Mobile app finally available
features.description: Appreciation that a mobile companion app is now available after using the web version

features.name: Loves the concept (generic)
features.description: Generic high praise without identifying a specific feature: 'amazing', 'wonderful', 'best app'

features.name: Dislikes the concept (generic)
features.description: Generic dismissive criticism without identifying a specific feature: 'trash', 'useless', 'garbage'

features.name: Old version was better
features.description: Strong preference for a previous version of the app or web product; 'bring back the old'

features.name: Using it for content creation
features.description: Explicit mention of using the app for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, UGC, or professional content workflows

features.name: Animating personal photos
features.description: Using the app to animate personal, family, friends, or pet photos

features.name: Patience with beta status
features.description: Forgiving attitude because the app is acknowledged to be in beta; willing to wait for improvements

features.name: Comparison to competing AI tools
features.description: Explicit comparison to other AI tools — Sora, Veo, Gemini, ChatGPT, Midjourney, Runway, Pika, Grok, Stable Diffusion

features.name: Credits wasted on failed generations
features.description: Specific complaint that credits are deducted even when generation fails or output is wrong (distinct from general credit complaints)

features.name: Wants free / unlimited access
features.description: Desire for the app to remain free, be cheaper, or offer more generous free quota

features.name: Recommends to others
features.description: Explicit recommendation to other users

features.name: Explicitly not recommended
features.description: Explicit warning not to download or try the app
